Note: Former chapter 663 (Sec. 37-1 et seq.), entitled “INTEREST”, has been renumbered as chapter 673 to allow for the creation of titles 36a, The Banking Law of Connecticut, and 36b, Connecticut Securities Law and Business Opportunity Act. These titles constitute successor provisions to former title 36 and certain sections from title 42.
